# St. Louis Bankruptcy - Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Filing bankruptcy in St. Louis? Free 2026 guide covering Missouri exemptions, Chapter 7 vs 13, local court info, costs, and the means test.

## About
stlouisbankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.
